---
id: get-image
title: "Download image"
description: "Streams an image. Pass `width` to receive a pre-rendered variant; SVGs are sanitized inline. The id can be either a file object ID or a raw file CID. Same bearer-token auth as other endpoints."
sidebar_label: "Download image"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/reference/2025-05-20/anytype-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Download image"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/spaces/{space_id}/images/{image_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Streams an image. Pass `width` to receive a pre-rendered variant; SVGs are sanitized inline. The id can be either a file object ID or a raw file CID. Same bearer-token auth as other endpoints.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"description":"The version of the API to use","in":"header","name":"Anytype-Version","required":true,"schema":{"default":"2025-05-20","type":"string"}},{"description":"The ID of the space the image belongs to","in":"path","name":"space_id","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"description":"The image object ID or file CID","in":"path","name":"image_id","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"description":"Optional pixel width for a pre-rendered variant","in":"query","name":"width","schema":{"type":"integer"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"file"}},"image/*":{"schema":{"type":"string"}}},"description":"Image contents"},"401":{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"code":{"example":"unauthorized","type":"string"},"message":{"example":"Unauthorized","type":"string"},"object":{"example":"error","type":"string"},"status":{"example":401,"type":"integer"}},"type":"object","title":"UnauthorizedError"}}},"description":"Unauthorized"},"404":{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"code":{"example":"object_not_found","type":"string"},"message":{"example":"Resource not found","type":"string"},"object":{"example":"error","type":"string"},"status":{"example":404,"type":"integer"}},"type":"object","title":"NotFoundError"}}},"description":"Image not found"},"500":{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"code":{"example":"internal_server_error","type":"string"},"message":{"example":"Internal server error","type":"string"},"object":{"example":"error","type":"string"},"status":{"example":500,"type":"integer"}},"type":"object","title":"ServerError"}}},"description":"Internal server error"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
